name_en: Top-tier Original Reproduction Exclusive Real Shot 📷【Cookie BB Shoulder Moon Tote】M15056 Monogram/Black Leather
name_cn:
Top-tier Original Reproduction Exclusive Real Shot 📷【Cookie BB Shoulder Moon Tote】M15056 Monogram/Black Leather
Crafted from Monogram coated canvas, featuring contrasting leather trim to highlight the crescent shape. The lightweight design combines an adjustable handle and a detachable chain, allowing for effortless conversion between shoulder and crossbody styles. Connect the ends of the tote to create a trendy wristlet look.
Dimensions: 19 x 5 x 28.5 cm
